item.title: Celsius co-founders face $4.72B judgment and permanent crypto marketing ban under FTC settlement
SEC adds crypto market structure to 2026 regulatory agenda with proposed rulemaking targeted for July
SEC approves generic listing standards for crypto ETPs, streamlining exchange listings without full rule-change process
CLARITY Act crypto market structure bill advances toward Senate vote after ethics provisions accepted
DTCC begins limited tokenization production trades with JPMorgan, BlackRock, and Goldman Sachs in July 2026
OCC conditionally approved Circle, Ripple, Paxos, and Fidelity Digital Assets for national trust bank charters
UK FCA final crypto rules set 350,000 GBP minimum net capital for stablecoin issuers
MiCA transitional period closed July 1; over 18% of European crypto platforms exited or shut down rather than comply
Ostium perpetuals exchange lost approximately $18M after attackers compromised a price oracle private key
CFTC sues commodity pool operator for allegedly soliciting $14M from 60 investors through crypto fund fraud
Crypto.com receives $400M investment from Citadel Securities at $20 billion valuation
JPMorgan JPMD deposit token runs on Coinbase Base; Citi Token Services enables 24/7 tokenized dollar clearing
Basel Committee virtual asset disclosure framework for banks takes effect in 2026
